New Year’s Email Promotion #2 				                Copyright Free Template



Subject: New Year’s Inventory Blowout Is Here



The New Year is almost upon us. And it’s time to

start 2015 right by offering you the lowest prices

possible. 



[insert deal]



Why am I doing this?  Because I need to get rid of 

a lot of my old stock in order to make way for new 

inventory…



…so, as they say, “Everything Must Go!” 



So, while you’re spending time with family, 

planning your New Year’s Eve celebration, and 

making your New Year’s Resolutions…



…this is one Resolution you don’t want to ignore!



So go to: 



[insert link]…



…and get the lowest prices all year.  



Sincerely, 



[insert name]



P.S.  Remember, once the ball drops on New Year’sEve and the calendar flips to 2015, this deal is gone.  



So don’t miss out…head on over to [insert call to action…

call or go to website], Now’s the time to ring in the New Year right and [insert transformation or benefits they’ll 

get from your product or service].
